title: ProductionRequirementTypeValues
description:
Required integration with internal or external systems

Comment:
Example:
Credit card product must integrate with Visa network

x-enumeration-literals.name: Configuration Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Product setup or parameter configuration needed

Comment:
Example:
Configure mortgage interest calculation method

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Production controls required for regulatory compliance

Comment:
Example:
Savings product must comply with deposit protection rules

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accounting Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ledger and financial posting setup requirements

Comment:
Example:
Define GL mapping for loan disbursement entries

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fulfillment Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Physical or digital fulfillment setup requirements

Comment:
Example:
Debit card embossing configuration required

x-enumeration-literals.name: Infrastructure Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Technical environment or infrastructure dependency

Comment:
Example:
Product requires real-time payment processing platform

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Required master/reference/customer data for production

Comment:
Example:
Customer KYC data required before account creation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Workflow Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Required production workflow or orchestration steps

Comment:
Example:
Loan approval workflow must complete before activation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Security and access controls required in production

Comment:
Example:
Encryption required for digital wallet provisioning

x-enumeration-literals.name: Versioning Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Product lifecycle and release management requirements

Comment:
Example:
New product version approval required before deployment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Testing Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Validation or testing requirements before release

Comment:
Example:
UAT completion required before product launch

x-enumeration-literals.name: Template Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Standard templates or predefined configurations needed

Comment:
Example:
SME loan product uses predefined risk template
